ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lisa Sarto.
Gregory O'Bianco, Esq. for Plaintiff: Donald Dickerson, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declaration, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants: Nia Hai He and Ho Chin Lin.
Damages of $324,749.92
Costs of $290.00
For the total of $325,039.92
Judgment signed in open court.
